evals.prompt: I'm getting 403 Forbidden when trying to create items via MCP in Directus. How do I fix this?
evals.expected_output: Role permissions, system collection permissions, MCP user permission table
expectations: Identifies insufficient role permissions as the cause
Lists system collections needing permissions (directus_collections, directus_fields, directus_relations)
Provides a permission table for MCP user minimum setup
Mentions checking both user collection and system collection permissions

evals.prompt: My Directus flow operations aren't executing even though the flow is active
evals.expected_output: Check flow.operation, resolve/reject chains, condition syntax, request format
expectations: Checks flow.operation field points to first operation UUID
Warns about condition filter syntax (nested objects, not dot notation)
Mentions request body must be stringified JSON
Mentions request headers must be array of {header, value} objects
